dashboard_page_visible_test = <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x7f5e3bb62850>
name = 'contact_us_title', testid = 'footer', expected_text = 'CONTACT US'

    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @pytest.mark.regression
    @pytest.mark.visible
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("name,testid,expected_text", [
        ("logo", "footer", "CrowdHive"),
        ("general_terms", "link-footer-terms", "General Terms"),
        ("privacy_policy", "link-footer-privacy", "Privacy and Cookie Policy"),
        ("debt_collection", "link-footer-debt", "Debt Collection"),
        ("aml_policy", "link-footer-aml", "AML Policy"),
        ("client_policy", "link-footer-client-policy", "Client Policy"),
        ("polyreg_sro", "link-footer-polyreg", "PolyReg SRO"),
        ("about_us_title", "footer", "ABOUT US"),
        ("about_us_home", "link-footer-home", "Home"),
        ("about_us_faq", "link-footer-faq", "FAQ"),
        ("about_us_blog", "link-footer-blog", "Blog"),
        ("about_us_about", "link-footer-about-us", "About"),
        ("about_us_invite", "link-footer-invite-friends", "Invite friends"),
        ("about_us_crowdlending", "link-footer-crowdlending", "What is Crowdlending?"),
        ("contact_us_title", "footer", "CONTACT US"),
        ("contact_us_support_email", "link-footer-support-email", "support@crowdhive.ch"),
        ("contact_us_info_email", "link-footer-commercial-email", "info@crowdhive.ch"),
        ("contact_us_address", "footer", "Address: Smith street"),
        ("follow_us_title", "footer", "FOLLOW US"),
        ("community_title", "footer", "COMMUNITY"),
    ])
    def test_footer_element_visible_with_text(dashboard_page_visible_test: DashboardPage, name, testid, expected_text):
        allure.dynamic.title(f"Проверка видимости элемента и его текста: {name}")
        dashboard_page_visible_test.close_modal()
        dashboard_page_visible_test.wait_for_component('footer.footer-dashboard')
        dashboard_page_visible_test.check_element_visible(testid, name)
>       dashboard_page_visible_test.check_element_text(testid, name, expected_text)
